suite_name: Login functionality and verfiy login user and logout functionlity

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user is redirected away from the login page
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed
Verify no error messages are shown on the page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid credentials

positive_scenarios.expected_result: The authenticated user's identity (email or display name) is visible on the post-login page confirming the correct user is logged in
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Verify the logged-in user's name or email 'testd1051@gmail.com' is displayed in the header, profile section, or navigation bar
Verify a profile icon or avatar is visible indicating an active session
positive_scenarios.title: Verify logged-in user identity is displayed after login

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out and redirected to the login page with no active session remaining
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Locate the logout option (e.g., profile menu, avatar icon, or 'Logout' / 'Sign Out' button in the navigation)
Click the 'Logout' / 'Sign Out' button or menu option
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Verify no authenticated user session indicators are present
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout after login

positive_scenarios.expected_result: After logout, accessing a protected route redirects the user to the login page, confirming the session has been properly invalidated
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the dashboard or home page is displayed and note its URL
Locate and click the 'Logout' / 'Sign Out' option
Verify the user is redirected to the login page
Attempt to navigate directly to the previously accessed dashboard URL
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page and not granted access to the protected page
positive_scenarios.title: Verify protected page redirects to login after logout and cannot be accessed without re-authentication

positive_scenarios.expected_result: All required login page UI elements are displayed correctly, and the password field masks input for security
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page title or heading is displayed (e.g., 'Login', 'Sign In')
Verify the email/username input field is present and visible
Verify the password input field is present and visible
Verify the password field masks the input (characters appear as dots or asterisks)
Verify the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button is present and enabled
Verify any additional links such as 'Forgot Password' or 'Sign Up' are visible if applicable
positive_scenarios.title: Login page UI elements are correctly displayed

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session persists after page refresh and the user remains authenticated on the dashboard page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard or home page
Refresh the browser page (press F5 or Ctrl+R)
Verify the user remains on the dashboard or home page and is not redirected to the login page
Verify the user's identity/session indicator is still visible after the refresh
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and session persistence on page refresh

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and validation error messages are displayed indicating that both username and password fields are required
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the email/username field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify appropriate validation error messages are displayed (e.g., 'Email is required', 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected and an appropriate error message is displayed informing the user of invalid credentials without revealing which field is incorrect
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter an incorrect password 'WrongPassword@123' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials', 'Incorrect username or password')
Verify the password field is cleared or remains for re-entry
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid email but incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected and an appropriate error message is displayed; the system does not reveal whether the email exists in the system
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a non-existent email 'nonexistentuser_xyz@fakeemail.com' in the email/username field
Enter any password 'Password@123' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials', 'User not found', 'Incorrect username or password')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid/non-existent email and any password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error message is displayed indicating the password field is required
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify a validation error message is displayed specifically for the password field (e.g., 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty password field only

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error message is displayed indicating the email/username field is required
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the email/username field empty
Enter a valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify a validation error message is displayed specifically for the email field (e.g., 'Email is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty email field only

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented with a format validation error message indicating the email address format is invalid
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter an invalid email format 'invalidemail' (without @ and domain) in the email/username field
Enter any password 'Password@123' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify a format validation error message is displayed (e.g., 'Please enter a valid email address')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login attempt with SQL injection is rejected safely; no unauthorized access is granted and no sensitive application error information is exposed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter SQL injection string ''' OR '1'='1' --' in the email/username field
Enter any password 'Password@123' in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user is NOT logged in or redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed or the login is simply rejected
Verify no application error, stack trace, or sensitive information is exposed
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in the email field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected; the system should either treat whitespace-only input as empty and show a required field error, or reject it as invalid credentials
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the email/username field
Enter only whitespace characters (e.g., multiple spaces '     ') in the password field
Click the 'Login' / 'Sign In' button
Verify the user remains on the login page
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials' or 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with password containing only whitespace characters
